mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_type, party_a_name, party_b_name, currency, amount_ex_tax, tax_rate_pct, amount_inc_tax, sign_date, effective_date, end_date, performance_site, payment_terms_summary, business_owner_dept, risk_tier, vector_doc_id, notes FROM contracts WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contracts ( id, contract_type, party_a_name, party_b_name, currency, amount_ex_tax, tax_rate_pct, amount_inc_tax, sign_date, effective_date, end_date, performance_site, payment_terms_summary, business_owner_dept, risk_tier, vector_doc_id, notes ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{type}, #{partyAName}, #{partyBName}, #{currency}, #{amountExTax}, #{taxRatePct}, #{amountIncTax}, #{signDate}, #{effectiveDate}, #{endDate}, #{performanceSite}, #{paymentTermsSummary}, #{businessOwnerDept}, #{riskTier}, #{vectorDocId}, #{notes} ) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET contract_type = EXCLUDED.contract_type, party_a_name = EXCLUDED.party_a_name, party_b_name = EXCLUDED.party_b_name, currency = EXCLUDED.currency, amount_ex_tax = EXCLUDED.amount_ex_tax, tax_rate_pct = EXCLUDED.tax_rate_pct, amount_inc_tax = EXCLUDED.amount_inc_tax, sign_date = EXCLUDED.sign_date, effective_date = EXCLUDED.effective_date, end_date = EXCLUDED.end_date, performance_site = EXCLUDED.performance_site, payment_terms_summary = EXCLUDED.payment_terms_summary, business_owner_dept = EXCLUDED.business_owner_dept, risk_tier = EXCLUDED.risk_tier, vector_doc_id = EXCLUDED.vector_doc_id, notes = EXCLUDED.notes
